condition_notes: Loose cartridge (no box/manual). Untested — not verified on hardware; sold as-is. Atari 400/800 8-bit COMPUTER version (not the common 2600 cart). Label 720149-1A, clean with minor wear.

experimental.purpose: Live production testbed for the RG-controlled buy-redirect layer (items/RG-0027/buy/index.html, driven by status.json). First item to run the redirect pattern in production.
experimental.note: Item is physically SOLD (state=Sold) but intentionally kept LIVE as an experiment. Do NOT archive it, delete buy/, or 'clean up' the experimental.* / qr_codes.buy fields without checking with the owner — this is the canary for rolling the redirect layer into rg-full-auto + rg-item-mark-sold.

lot_ref: Atari MASTER lot catalog → ATARI-S57 (valuations tab, loose-cart series). eBay custom label = ATARI-S57.

buy.use: Scan to buy — RG-controlled redirect layer (buy/index.html) that forwards to Square checkout while for sale and shows a graceful 'sold' page once sold, driven by status.json.
